calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jan-09-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Anthony J. DiPiero, Esq. of HUNT & HENRIQUES, T:408.362.2276, for plaintiff/moving party on Court Call;
Vida Ventura, T:415.810.6059, defendant appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: Defendant's oral request for additional time to obtain counsel was denied. Therefore, there being no opposition, the Court adopted its tentative ruling, as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment were signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

Notice Of Motion & Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anthony Dipiero, Esq. 408-362-2274 of Hunt & Henriques for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Vida Ventura, Esq. 415-810-6059 Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces the tentative ruling and asks re: Rockwell Legal Group. Plaintiff argues motion was properly served and requests to continue the matter. Defendant informs the Court she is being represented by Rockwell Legal Group. The Court denies Plaintiff's request to continue the matter. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Off calendar. Defendant's answer, filed August 29, 2019, states she is represented by Rockwell Legal Group, and provides that legal representative's address, email address, and phone number. Plaintiff's motion was served on Defendant personally rather than on her counsel.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
